nasb.text: “Behold, I am coming quickly, and My reward is with Me, to render to every man according to what he has done.

esv.text: “Behold,     I am coming soon,     bringing my recompense with me,     to repay each one for what he has done.

cnv.text: “看哪，我必快來！賞賜在我，我要照著各人所行的報應他。

ccb.text: “看啊，我快要来了，到时候我要按各人的行为施行赏罚。

csbs.text: “看哪，我快要来了！我带着报偿，要按照各人的行为回报每个人。
